note: This EPD covers many distinct products (fiber cement boards of thicknesses 4-25 mm produced at three plants: MLG, JJR, DND), each with its own A1-A3 GWP value per 1 m2 declared unit. There is no single aggregated GWP value. The GWP (CML method, labelled 'Global warming potential (GWP)') A1-A3 values range from ~3.53 kg CO2-eq (4 mm DND) up to ~25.6 kg CO2-eq (25 mm MLG). For example, the first table (4 mm board at MLG) reports A1-A3 GWP = 4.126312048 kg CO2-eq. The EPD reports only a single total GWP indicator and does not separate GWP into fossil, biogenic, or GWP-GHG components. A single representative value cannot be selected, hence gwp_total_a1a3 is left null.
